ogTitle: Tannas Mount vs Tantawangalo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tannas Mount and Tantawangalo.
heading: Tannas Mount vs Tantawangalo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tannas Mount, New South Wales and Tantawangalo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tantawangalo has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Tannas Mount (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tannas Mount or Tantawangalo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tannas Mount has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Tantawangalo scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tannas Mount scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Tantawangalo scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tannas Mount or Tantawangalo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tantawangalo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
